serving.natural_language_portion: One standard can of 100 Plus Zero is 325 ml, equivalent to approximately 325 g, which is the typical single-serve portion sold in Singapore convenience stores and food courts.

nutrient_source.title: 100 Plus Zero Sugar Isotonic Drink — Nutrition Information Panel (F&N Foods Singapore)
nutrient_source.organization: Fraser & Neave (F&N) Holdings / USDA FoodData Central cross-reference for zero-sugar carbonated isotonic beverages
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values derived from the product nutrition information panel for 100 Plus Zero (F&N Singapore) and cross-referenced with USDA FoodData Central entries for zero-sugar carbonated isotonic beverages (e.g., USDA FDC ID 2097512, 'Carbonated water with electrolytes, zero calorie'). Energy, protein, fat, and carbohydrate are confirmed zero per product label. Sodium and potassium are from the declared electrolyte content on the product panel. All zero macro values are confirmed zero by product formulation and label declaration.

gi_source.title: Glycemic Index of Beverages — Zero-sugar carbonated isotonic drinks contain no glycemic carbohydrates; GI assigned by convention
gi_source.source_match_notes: 100 Plus Zero contains no glycemic carbohydrates (carbohydrate_g = 0.0, sugar_g = 0.0 per 100 g). No direct GI test exists for this product. Per University of Sydney GI Database convention for zero-carbohydrate beverages, glycemic_index is set to 1 (effectively zero) and gi_category is 'low'. Glycemic load per serving is 0.0 as there are no glycemic carbohydrates to load. This is consistent with the GI Database treatment of diet sodas and zero-sugar drinks.

hypertension.guidance: 100 Plus Zero contains approximately 46 mg sodium per 100 ml (approximately 150 mg per 325 ml can), which is modest and unlikely to meaningfully raise blood pressure when consumed in single-serve quantities; however, individuals on strict sodium-restricted diets should account for this electrolyte contribution.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Zero glycemic carbohydrates; artificial sweeteners used
type2_diabetes.guidance: 100 Plus Zero contains no sugar or glycemic carbohydrates and uses acesulfame K and sucralose as sweeteners, resulting in a glycemic index of effectively zero and no postprandial blood glucose impact, making it a suitable beverage choice for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes; however, long-term effects of artificial sweeteners on insulin sensitivity should be considered.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Zero fat, zero sugar, low sodium electrolyte profile
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: 100 Plus Zero contains no fat, no sugar, and no cholesterol, and its low sodium electrolyte content poses minimal cardiovascular risk; it is a suitable hydration option for individuals with cardiovascular disease when consumed in moderation as part of a balanced fluid intake.

llm_training.natural_language_description: 100 Plus Zero is a zero-sugar, zero-calorie variant of the iconic 100 Plus isotonic carbonated beverage manufactured by Fraser & Neave (F&N) in Singapore. It is a ready-to-drink, commercially produced carbonated soft drink formulated with electrolytes including sodium and potassium, and sweetened with artificial sweeteners (acesulfame K and sucralose) instead of sugar. The drink has a light, citrus-tinged flavour with mild carbonation, delivering the refreshing isotonic character of the original 100 Plus without any caloric or glycaemic load. It is widely available across Singapore in 325 ml cans and 500 ml bottles at hawker centres, food courts, convenience stores, and supermarkets. Nutritionally, 100 Plus Zero provides essentially zero energy, zero protein, zero fat, and zero carbohydrate per 100 ml, with a small electrolyte contribution of approximately 46 mg sodium and 12 mg potassium per 100 ml. It is suitable for vegetarians, vegans, and individuals following halal diets. Clinically, it is appropriate for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes due to its zero glycaemic index and zero sugar content, and poses minimal concern for hypertension or cardiovascular disease given its low sodium and zero fat profile. It is commonly consumed as a thirst-quenching beverage during meals or after physical activity in the Singaporean context.
common_user_queries: Is 100 Plus Zero suitable for diabetics?
How many calories in 100 Plus Zero?
What sweetener is in 100 Plus Zero?
Is 100 Plus Zero good for weight loss?
100 Plus Zero vs 100 Plus original nutrition
Can I drink 100 Plus Zero if I have high blood pressure?

Electrolyte values (sodium, potassium) are derived from declared product label content. The food is a well-known branded product with consistent formulation.
notes: 100 Plus Zero is a zero-calorie, zero-sugar isotonic carbonated beverage. energy_kcal is confirmed zero by product formulation — this is a zero-calorie beverage by design. protein_g is naturally zero as this is a carbonated water-based beverage containing no protein ingredients. fat_g is naturally zero by product formulation — no fat-containing ingredients are present. carbohydrate_g is confirmed zero per product label; artificial sweeteners (acesulfame K, sucralose) are used in place of sugar and do not contribute glycaemic carbohydrates. sugar_g is confirmed zero per product label. dietary_fibre_g is confirmed zero as this is a liquid beverage with no fibre-containing ingredients. saturated_fat_g, monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g, and cholesterol_mg are all confirmed zero by product formulation. glycemic_index set to 1 (effectively zero) as this beverage contains no glycemic carbohydrates; gi_category low per convention consistent with University of Sydney GI Database treatment of zero-carbohydrate beverages. calcium_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. iron_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_c_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_b3_niacin_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_b6_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_b12_mcg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. folate_mcg_dfe is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_d_mcg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. vitamin_e_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. phosphorus_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. magnesium_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. zinc_mg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel. selenium_mcg is -1 as it is not reported on the product nutrition panel.
